files.purpose: Tabix-indexed GRCh37 CHROM/POS/REF/ALT to ClinVar rsID annotation table for bcftools annotate.
Tabix index for the lean ClinVar rsID annotation table.
Compressed rsID-keyed ClinVar interpretation index: rsID, clinical significance, disease, gene, review status.

disclosure.rsid_source: ClinVar GRCh37 rsID subset, generated from INFO/RS in NCBI ClinVar.
disclosure.limitation: ClinVar rsID recovery only. This is not full dbSNP annotation and will miss many non-ClinVar rsIDs used by GWAS, PRS, and consumer wellness markers.
disclosure.not_diagnostic: ClinVar findings are educational and are not a diagnosis, treatment plan, or clinical decision tool. Confirm clinically before medical action.
disclosure.vus_policy: Variants of uncertain significance are shown as uncertain context only and are not used as medical action triggers.
